notes_for_consumers: Checked on every super and every director-written line. The four hard rules apply absolutely. The claims hierarchy is priority order; lead with the higher-priority claim. JD Power VDS dependability is the lead claim across 2026. Disclaimer language is verbatim where required; fall back to 'See dealer for details' when unsure. Year-End retail does NOT relax the Hurricane cylinder-count rule, the title-case rule, or the sponsor sign-off rule.

hard_rules.detail: Write 'Ram' in all authored text (capital R, lowercase a, lowercase m). Do NOT write 'RAM', 'ram', or 'RAM Trucks' in body text. The all-caps RAM wordmark only appears in logo lockups.
When Ram is credited as sponsor or presenter: 'Sponsored by Ram trucks. Nothing Stops Ram.' Must not be reordered, truncated, or altered.
Do NOT emphasize the Hurricane I6's six-cylinder count. Refer to 'Hurricane' or 'powertrain choice' or specific output figures (horsepower, torque).
Lead with the JD Power 2026 VDS dependability win as the accredited third-party quality proof. Front and center in at least one concept per campaign; do NOT minimize.

claims_hierarchy: America's Most Dependable Full-Size Truck — JD Power (2026 VDS, Ram 1500). Lead claim for any quality-adjacent moment.
America's Most Powerful Lineup of Full-Size Light-Duty Gas Production Trucks.
America's Best Powertrain Limited Warranty — 10 yr / 100,000 mi (2026 models).
disclaimer_language: Based on 33,268 original owners of 2023 MY vehicles after 3 years.
Powertrain Limited Warranty on 2026 models. Excludes [list]. See Powertrain Limited Warranty for details.

tone_modulation_by_moment.football_brand_campaign: Aug–Jan: full NSR voice, manifesto-adjacent, loud.
tone_modulation_by_moment.year_end_retail: Q4: NSR voice inherited but dialed for sales-event close. Less manifesto, more product and warranty. Confident over Relentless.
tone_modulation_by_moment.always_on_retail_map: Year-round: voice matches the brand campaign in flight; never softer than brand baseline.
